name: Gingered Hippolyta
recipeIngredient: 3 medium Pears, very ripe, seeds and stems removed
recipeInstructions:
1. Cut the pears into small chunks.
2. Put the pear chunks in a blender with lemon juice and ginger.
3. Blend thoroughly at medium speed.
4. Pour into dessert bowls and serve immediately.
5. Otherwise, cover the dessert bowls tightly and store in the refrigerator. Will keep for 3 to 5 days.
